option.name: originalContent
option.value:
[project] name = "machine-learning" version = "0.1.0" description = "Personal ML engineering framework — unified repo for apps and shared modules" readme = "README.md" requires-python = ">=3.11" dependencies = [ "pyyaml>=6.0", "python-dotenv>=1.0", ]
[build-system] requires = ["hatchling"] build-backend = "hatchling.build"
[tool.hatch.build.targets.wheel] packages = ["machine_learning"]
[project.scripts] # Register app entrypoints here as apps are added: # titanic = "machine_learning.apps.titanic.main:main" # finance = "machine_learning.apps.personal_finance.main:main"
[dependency-groups] dev = [ "pytest>=8.0", ]
[tool.pytest.ini_options] testpaths = ["tests"] python_files = ["test_*.py"] python_classes = ["Test*"] python_functions = ["test_*"]

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
[project] name = "machine-learning" version = "0.1.0" description = "Personal ML engineering framework — unified repo for apps and shared modules" readme = "README.md" requires-python = ">=3.11" dependencies = [ "pyyaml>=6.0", "python-dotenv>=1.0", ]
[build-system] requires = ["hatchling"] build-backend = "hatchling.build"
[tool.hatch.build.targets.wheel] packages = ["machinelearning"]
[project.scripts] # Register app entrypoints here as apps are added: # titanic = "machinelearning.apps.titanic.main:main" # finance = "machinelearning.apps.personal_finance.main:main"
[dependency-groups] dev = [ "pytest>=8.0", ]
[tool.pytest.ini_options] testpaths = ["tests"] python_files = ["test_*.py"] python_classes = ["Test*"] python_functions = ["test_*"]

option.name: originalContent
option.value:
#!/bin/bash # deploy.sh — despliega los endpoints del proyecto a partir de los entrypoints
set -e cd "$(dirname "$0")" cd .. # navegar al project root
# Cargar variables de entorno if [ -f .env ]; then export $(grep -v '^#' .env | xargs) fi
HOST=${HOST:-0.0.0.0} PORT=${PORT:-8000}
# Override: si se pasa una app específica, desplegar solo esa if [ $# -gt 0 ]; then APP=$1 echo "=== Deploying $APP (${HOST}:${PORT}) ===" uv run python -m machine_learning.apps.${APP}.main serve exit 0 fi
# Sin argumentos: menú interactivo con todas las apps disponibles echo "" echo "=== Deploy — Endpoints disponibles ===" echo ""
i=1 declare -a apps for app_dir in machine_learning/apps/*/; do app_name=$(basename "$app_dir") echo " [$i] $app_name" apps[$i]=$app_name i=$((i + 1)) done echo " [0] Exit" echo "" read -p "Select app to deploy: " option
if [ "$option" = "0" ]; then echo "Bye!" exit 0 fi
selected=${apps[$option]} if [ -z "$selected" ]; then echo "Opción desconocida: $option" exit 1 fi
echo "=== Deploying $selected (${HOST}:${PORT}) ===" uv run python -m machine_learning.apps.${selected}.main serve

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
#!/bin/bash # deploy.sh — despliega los endpoints del proyecto a partir de los entrypoints
set -e cd "$(dirname "$0")" cd .. # navegar al project root
# Cargar variables de entorno if [ -f .env ]; then export $(grep -v '^#' .env | xargs) fi
HOST=${HOST:-0.0.0.0} PORT=${PORT:-8000}
# Override: si se pasa una app específica, desplegar solo esa if [ $# -gt 0 ]; then APP=$1 echo "=== Deploying $APP (${HOST}:${PORT}) ===" uv run python -m machinelearning.apps.${APP}.main serve exit 0 fi
# Sin argumentos: menú interactivo con todas las apps disponibles echo "" echo "=== Deploy — Endpoints disponibles ===" echo ""
i=1 declare -a apps for app_dir in machinelearning/apps/*/; do app_name=$(basename "$app_dir") echo " [$i] $app_name" apps[$i]=$app_name i=$((i + 1)) done echo " [0] Exit" echo "" read -p "Select app to deploy: " option
if [ "$option" = "0" ]; then echo "Bye!" exit 0 fi
selected=${apps[$option]} if [ -z "$selected" ]; then echo "Opción desconocida: $option" exit 1 fi
echo "=== Deploying $selected (${HOST}:${PORT}) ===" uv run python -m machinelearning.apps.${selected}.main serve
